schema.name: TZPID source truth recovered from master ordering

theory.canonical_statement: The "Fold" is the system's primary method of steering resonance. It uses an **Axis-Driven Operator** mathcal\{L\}(t) = mathcal\{L\}\_0 + epsilonmathcal\{L\}\_1(hat\{n\}(t)) to introduce controlled symmetry-breaking. This perturbation forces energy to bypass static mode-locking, re-routing it rather
